name: Auto Deafen for Eclipse
description: Mega-Hack-style Auto Deafen: press Left Shift in a level to configure a readable recorded keybind and deafen percentage; the key is pressed again on death, completion, restart, or exit.

enabled.name: Auto Deafen
enabled.description: Enable automatic deafen while playing a level.

deafen-percent.name: Deafen at (%)
deafen-percent.description: Press your chosen Discord Toggle Deafen key when progress reaches this percentage.
